prestazioni: 3S-GTE (Gen 4) engine with forged internals: CP pistons (87mm, 9.0:1 CR), Eagle H-beam rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a billet crankshaft (77.6mm stroke) to handle 600+ hp at 1.5 bar boost on E85 fuel, paired with a Garrett GTX4202R turbo (0.82 A/R, 64mm inducer) and custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe with V-band clamps for optimized exhaust flow.

PWR Australia custom front-mount intercooler (1000hp-capable, 24" x 12" x 4.5" core) with dual 3.5" silicone couplers and Mishimoto X-Line clamps, fed by a Pierburg CWA100 water pump and 1.25" aluminum piping for consistent intake temps below 40°C in rally stages.

Ohlins TTX40 4-way adjustable dampers with 24-position rebound/compression adjustment, custom valving for the WRC99's MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear, paired with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm springs (front) and 800N/mm (rear) for gravel/asphalt transition handling, plus spherical bearing top mounts from Motorsport Developments UK.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (WRC99-specific, 60mm wider front fenders, 80mm rear) with carbon fiber overfenders and integrated tow hooks, paired with a custom aluminum rear diffuser from J's Racing (3-piece, 120mm height) for downforce optimization at 180+ km/h.

Recaro SRD-LW (WRC-spec) seats in Kevlar/carbon hybrid shell, trimmed in Alcantera with custom Toyota Gazoo Racing (TGR) embroidery, mounted on Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses and custom aluminum seat rails (TIG-welded, 2mm 6061-T6) for FIA compliance.

Custom rally livery by BBS Motorsport Graphics: 3M 1080 vinyl wrap in "TGR Blue" with matte black accents, WRC99-specific sponsor decals (Castrol, Denso, Michelin), and hand-painted "Corolla WRC" script on the hood in 24k gold leaf for vintage rally authenticity.
